prompt: Build a community page for Reveal.
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Why a home exists
nodes.details: Community page is not a feed product — it is the first place she feels safe talking about money.
nodes.strategicAnswer: A place women feel safe talking about money

nodes.label: Lurker to member arc
nodes.details: Opening journey: arrive unsure → witness calm belonging → choose to be known without performance.

nodes.label: Access as promise
nodes.details: Charging later is allowed; gating v1 would hollow the founding promise of trusted community access.

nodes.label: Silence can be sacred
nodes.details: Being answered matters, but the story rejects engagement theater — quiet presence is part of belonging.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Prefer quiet belonging over engagement spam.

nodes.label: Tips without belonging
nodes.details: If the page becomes budgeting tips without trust, Reveal becomes another finance product and loses its wedge.

nodes.label: Faith-rooted invitation
nodes.details: Voice of the home: calm courage, no shame — money conversations become safe because identity is belonging-first.
